restaurants.listDescription: View and manage all Restaurants from here
restaurants.serviceChargeDescription: Set the restaurant-level service charge for customer quotes and orders. Transaction fee remains platform/global.
restaurants.serviceChargeInvalid: Enter a valid value. Percentage cannot exceed 100.

businessOwners.title: Business Owners
businessOwners.description: View and manage all business owners from here
businessOwners.createBusinessOwnerAccount: Create a new business owner account
businessOwners.ownerBioPlaceholder: Short bio about the business owner
businessOwners.branchAdminLoginDescription: This account will manage the created branch after registration. It is separate from the business owner account.
businessOwners.addressFromGoogleMapsDescription: Search an address, select a Google suggestion, click on the map, or drag the marker to set branch coordinates.
businessOwners.enableAddressMapHint: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in env to enable address search and map selection.
businessOwners.enablePolygonMapHint: Add NEXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY in env to enable polygon selection.
businessOwners.tenantCreatedNoOtpDescription: {tenant} is active for {email}. The owner can sign in after receiving their credentials.
businessOwners.paymentPendingDescription: Tenant creation is complete. Send payment instructions or collect payment without blocking access setup.
businessOwners.serviceChargeDescription: Super Admin can configure restaurant service charge on the restaurant/business owner details page.
businessOwners.radiusBandsDescription: Optional pricing bands for distance-based delivery. Example: 0-3 km, 3-7.5 km.
businessOwners.noRadiusBands: No radius bands configured. The base radius and delivery fee will be used.
businessOwners.polygonZoneBuilderDescription: Search an area, generate a starter zone, click the map to add points, then drag markers to fine-tune polygon boundaries.
businessOwners.searchAreaPlaceholder: Search area, street, city, or landmark
businessOwners.pointsSelected: {count, plural, one {# point selected} other {# points selected}}
businessOwners.clickMapToAdd: Click map to add - drag markers to adjust
businessOwners.polygonDeliveryZonesDescription: Each zone can have its own delivery fee, minimum order, free-delivery threshold, and polygon points.
businessOwners.polygonPointsHint: Add at least 3 points for a valid polygon.
businessOwners.postalCodeRulesDescription: Add one or more postal-code based delivery rules.
businessOwners.noPostalCodeRules: No postal code rules configured yet.

status.accessDisabledDescription: Business admin login is blocked because access is inactive
status.approvalTwoFactorPendingDescription: Approve this business owner to verify and approve access
status.twoFactorPendingDescription: Already approved but verification needs repair. Click Approve again.

maps.enterAddress: Please enter an address to search.
maps.notReady: Google Maps is not ready yet.

customers.description: View customer distribution across global regions

orders.performanceDescription: View real-time order tracking and revenue analytics

products.description: Monitor product availability across the platform

globalSettings.title: Global Settings
globalSettings.globalTaxDescription: Set the default tax percentage applied to transactions across the platform.
globalSettings.vatRulesDescription: Choose how VAT/GST should be calculated and displayed system-wide.
globalSettings.taxCompleted: Tax applies only to completed transactions
globalSettings.platformServiceChargeDescription: Manage the global service charge used for customer quotes and orders. The amount is informational because menu prices already include service charges.
globalSettings.defaultCurrencyDescription: This currency will be used as the default for all monetary values.
globalSettings.paymentMethodsDescription: Enable or disable payment methods available across the platform.
globalSettings.paymentMethodsLoadFailed: Failed to load payment methods. Please try again.
globalSettings.apiManagedCode: Code is managed by the platform API and cannot be edited.
globalSettings.duplicatePaymentMethods: Duplicate payment method codes are not allowed.
globalSettings.taxTypesDescription: Manage the platform tax types used by restaurants and menu items. Saving sends the full tax type list to the backend.
globalSettings.taxTypesReadonlyDescription: Tax types are available for display and dropdowns. Only Super Admin can edit them.
globalSettings.taxTypesLoadFailed: Failed to load tax types. Please try again.

employeeSettings.employeeListDescription: View and manage all employees from here

rbac.description: Create and manage predefined roles to control access across different areas of the platform.
rbac.roleDescriptionPlaceholder: eg. Management role with operational access
rbac.permissionsDescription: Select which actions this role can perform
rbac.permissionModulesDescription: Manage backend-powered RBAC modules and their allowed actions.
rbac.noRoleSelectedDescription: Please select a role from the list to view and manage its permissions.
rbac.permissionsHelp: Select which modules and actions are accessible for each role.
rbac.deleteRoleDescription: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action cannot be undone.

placeholders.description: Short description for this package plan

create.planIdentityDescription: Define the naming conventions for this subscription tier.
create.subscriptionDescription: Configure plan price, currency, and billing interval.
create.commissionLimitsDescription: Configure flat fee or percentage-based transactional charges.
create.fixedCommissionHelp: A fixed amount will be charged on each order.
create.percentageCommissionHelp: A percentage commission will be charged on each order.
create.fixedCommissionCapHelp: Cap is not applicable for fixed fee per order.
create.percentageCommissionCapHelp: Optional maximum commission cap for percentage-based orders.
create.includedFeaturesDescription: Select the tools and modules accessible to subscribers in this tier.
create.vatConfigurationDescription: VAT is applied by the Super Admin to invoices issued to restaurant owners.
create.payoutAdjustmentsDescription: Allow manual invoice adjustments and define payout cycle.
create.failedToLoadPackagePlanDescription: Please go back to listing and try again.

steps.selectPricingModelDescription: Choose the billing structure for this subscription plan. New tier plans support configurable features. Legacy models support existing customers.
steps.configureDescription: Define pricing, billing cycle, commission rate, and transactional limits.
steps.featuresVatDescription: Define the core capabilities, VAT structure, payout cycle, and terms document for this plan.

pricingModels.hybridDescription: Minimum monthly fee and revenue share with optional max cap.
pricingModels.planDescription: Fixed monthly amount with optional bundles and features.
pricingModels.commissionDescription: Flat amount or percentage charged per order placed.

invoicing.noItemDetails: No item details available for this invoice.
invoicing.invoicePreviewDescription: Preview the invoice exactly as it will be downloaded or shared.

invoicing.shareNotSupported: Sharing is not supported in this browser. PDF downloaded instead.
invoicing.messagePlaceholder: Add an optional message for this invoice...
invoicing.additionalChargesHelp: Positive values are added. Negative values are subtracted.
invoicing.noInvoicesAvailable: No invoices available for the selected filters.
invoicing.selectRowsToGenerate: Select one or more table rows, then preview without opening a separate selection popup.

invoicing.generatedHistoryDescription: Review all generated invoice documents and send/download activity.
invoicing.weeklyPayoutDescription: Create and share weekly restaurant payout invoices.
invoicing.monthlySubscriptionDescription: Manage subscription invoices and billing status.
